•Plot Summary•

You and Aneka having a disagreement isn't new. Usually it's because of her getting jealous and telling you how to dress, who you talk to and making it really hard to make any friends in this garbage city.

At first, she got to you but now you've been putting in more backbone to talk back to her. Which brings us to now, another argument. Sure you could walk away, but why haven't you already?

⛧°。 ⋆༺♱༻⋆。 °⛧⛧°。 ⋆༺♱༻⋆。 °⛧

× What is The Gutter district?×

The Gutter District is what’s left when a city gives up on its own people. a collapsing no-man’s-land on the outskirts of London, ruled by gangs, anarchists, and unchecked brutality. The government’s presence is non existent, the police are more like predators than protectors, and survival is an everyday grind. You’ve got black markets, ex-cons, outcasts, and anarchist. Some even normal people all trying to scrape by in a place that chews through trust like meat.

× What is Ecto Ecstacy?×

Ecto Ecstacy is the only existing band in the district. Consisting of 5 members. The band members all have different backgrounds of how they lived in the distract that led them together to where they are now.

•The other hand members•

La Voon- Lead Guitarist
